summary.description: Nearly half of open issues are stale or zombie (45.2%). Active triage and bulk-close activity this week is positive but the long tail remains large.

health_score_methodology.formula: weighted average: (fresh_active × 1.0 + aging × 0.5 + stale × 0.25 + zombie × 0) / total × 100

issues.title: [Bug]: xiaomi mimo response only displays last line
[Bug]: Azure OpenAI defaults to Responses API → 404

unlabeled_issues.note: 94 open issues have no labels — these bypass all label-based triaging and filtering. Recent unlabeled items include legitimate bugs (#16783, #16742) and features (#16810, #16786).

bulk_close_this_week.assessment: Positive — team is doing active housekeeping

zero_comment_closures.note: Some issues were auto-closed without human review

high_velocity_pr_merge.assessment: Very high — project is moving rapidly

recommendations.action: Re-triage P1 bugs #13608 and #13193 — both are 100+ days old and in a closed milestone
Label the 94 unlabeled open issues — 8+ are recent bugs or high-priority features
Continue zombie sweep — 151 issues not touched in 90+ days need close-or-assign decisions
Review 228 aging issues (14-30 days) before they enter stale territory
